testcase.name: test_get_audit_actions

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'account': [{'name': 'ACCOUNT_CREATED', 'value': 'account.created'}, {'name': 'ACCOUNT_UPDATED', 'value': 'account.updated'}, {'name': 'ACCOUNT_DELETED', 'value': 'account.deleted'}], 'admin': [{'name': 'SETTINGS_UPDATED', 'value': 'admin.settings_updated'}, {'name': 'LLM_CONFIG_CHANGED', 'value': 'admin.llm_config_changed'}, {'name': 'GROUP_CREATED', 'value': 'admin.group_created'}, {'name': 'GROUP_UPDATED', 'value': 'admin.group_updated'}], 'ai': [{'name': 'AI_ANALYSIS_REQUESTED', 'value': 'ai.analysis_requested'}, {'name': 'AI_CHAT_MESSAGE', 'value': 'ai.chat_message'}, {'name': 'DOCUMENT_UPLOADED', 'value': 'ai.document_uploaded'}, {'name': 'DOCUMENT_DELETED', 'value': 'ai.document_deleted'}], 'asset': [{'name': 'ASSET_CREATED', 'value': 'asset.created'}, {'name': 'ASSET_UPDATED', 'value': 'asset.updated'}, {'name': 'ASSET_DELETED', 'value': 'asset.deleted'}], ...}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase4_institutional.py:136: in test_get_audit_actions assert isinstance(data["actions"], list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'account': [{'name': 'ACCOUNT_CREATED', 'value': 'account.created'}, {'name': 'ACCOUNT_UPDATED', 'value': 'account.updated'}, {'name': 'ACCOUNT_DELETED', 'value': 'account.deleted'}], 'admin': [{'name': 'SETTINGS_UPDATED', 'value': 'admin.settings_updated'}, {'name': 'LLM_CONFIG_CHANGED', 'value': 'admin.llm_config_changed'}, {'name': 'GROUP_CREATED', 'value': 'admin.group_created'}, {'name': 'GROUP_UPDATED', 'value': 'admin.group_updated'}], 'ai': [{'name': 'AI_ANALYSIS_REQUESTED', 'value': 'ai.analysis_requested'}, {'name': 'AI_CHAT_MESSAGE', 'value': 'ai.chat_message'}, {'name': 'DOCUMENT_UPLOADED', 'value': 'ai.document_uploaded'}, {'name': 'DOCUMENT_DELETED', 'value': 'ai.document_deleted'}], 'asset': [{'name': 'ASSET_CREATED', 'value': 'asset.created'}, {'name': 'ASSET_UPDATED', 'value': 'asset.updated'}, {'name': 'ASSET_DELETED', 'value': 'asset.deleted'}], ...}, list)
